text: ⚡ 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 The Russian Black Sea port of Novorossirsk is currently under an Ukrainian drone attack. It seems that the Russian oil export infrastructure is being targeted. @wfwitness

Tucker Carlson: You can’t murder the innocent. You can’t kill kids and women. That’s a war crime… but more important, it’s a moral crime. They pray at the WH not to pray for restraint, but to endorse the murder of civilians. How do you do that?

↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇮🇱 Israeli Channel 12: New details have emerged about the rescue of the American F‑15E navigator shot down over Iran. The officer was unconscious with a concussion and did not transmit a distress signal initially. He made first contact at 12:00 on…" ⚡ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 With new details emerging from the last night rescue operation in Iran we can now attempt to answer some major questions: Why the pair of HC-130J were abandonned and destroyed ? According to Channel 12's report they were stuck in the sand. Lack of preparations and bad luck probably played a role here. The depth of the dust was maybe underestimated. Why the helicoters did leave ? Because they did come there on their own. Due to their limited range they couldn't reach the forward base alone. They were likely brought in by the Hercules, and operated from the forward base. Why the MH-6 rather than the usual HH-60 ? There are multiple explanation for this. Maybe only a single SAR team was in the area and completed a complex exfiltration the day prior and needed some rest. The SOAR was thus called in. The nature of the terrain could have played a role. MH-6 are notoriously agile and can reach place other helicopters cant. And what happened to the crews, SOF operators and the WSO after the C-130 were stuck ? At least one C-295W from the 427th Special Aviation Squadron picked them up and was spotted in the early morning exiting Iranian airspace. @wfwitness

⚡ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇸🇾 🇮🇱 Kan: The U.S. requested that Israel suspend a planned strike on the Al-Masnaa border crossing between Syria and Lebanon shortly after an evacuation warning was issued. The IDF reports that Hezbollah was allegedly using the crossing and the nearby M30 road for military purposes, prompting preparations for a strike. However, the U.S. reportedly asked to delay the operation for political reasons, leaving the matter to Syrian security forces. A source says that Syrian authorities informed the U.S. they are actively working against Hezbollah and have recently foiled attempts to smuggle weapons from Syria into Lebanon. @wfwitness

🔄 Forwarded from Christopher Helali 🇷🇺🇺🇸: 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🫡 🎖 I was joined by Irishman and SMO veteran Aiden Minnis, recipient of the Medal of Suvorov for courage, to talk about his life, journey, and all things Russia-Ukraine. Aiden became a social media sensation for burning his UK passport and renouncing his citizenship. He now figures heavily in the British tabloids and press. Aiden and I spoke about his time at the front, the SMO, and where it’s heading. Most importantly, we spoke of the children who are being abused, trafficked, and killed by the Ukrainian regime. We spoke of the Ukrainian links to Jeffrey Epstein, Epstein’s attempts to overthrow the Russian government, and how the Ukrainian government, through criminal groups like “White Angel” and “Phoenix” are abducting, trafficking, sexually abusing, and harvesting the organs of children. Please watch this episode of The Chris Helali Show from DD Geopolitics. https://www.youtube.com/live/lBkjeB5qjHU?si=bz8auH-LZDqUKSq5 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 Follow me Christopher Helali, on YouTube , X, Instagram, and TikTok

🇮🇷 Saeed Jalili on the new power equation at the Strait of Hormuz: "The power we now hold is based on a logic the world cannot reject. Before, they spoke through force. Now we are speaking through logic." Iran now holds the geographic leverage, the entire world depends on the strait, and the entire world must comply with Iran's terms. The sanctions equation has flipped: if you claim free trade, you no longer get to decide who has access and who doesn't. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

🇮🇷 💥 🇺🇸 Some channels are circulating this image as though it were that of an American crew member involved in yesterday’s rescue operation. This is highly unlikely. The skull appears to be in a burnt out civilian car, unknown why it was at that site but hopefully not a random innocent. Furthermore, Americans are extremely unlikely to leave behind the deceased so carelessly. Credit where it’s due, American PJs and CRO’s are top-tier professionals of their field, their standards are thorough. While the American version of yesterday’s ordeal clearly hides a few things, given the Little Birds bent rotors and bullet punctures, optimistic fantasy can never substitute reality.

🇭🇺 🇷🇸 🇷🇺 ⚡️ 🇺🇦 Hungarian Prime Minister Orbán accuses Ukraine of sabotage and warns of direct threats to Hungary’s energy security: ~ Says a sabotage plot targeted the TurkStream pipeline section in Vojvodina ~ Claims Ukraine has long worked to cut Europe off from Russian energy ~ Accuses Kyiv of blowing up Nord Stream and shutting key pipelines ~ Says Hungary was placed under an “oil blockade” via the Druzhba pipeline ~ Warns TurkStream remains under continuous attack ~ Says Ukraine’s actions pose a direct threat to Hungary ~ “Hungary’s energy security is not a game.”

As I previously mentioned, Trump and his agent Netanyahu have no cards left to play besides bombing civilian infrastructure. Iran holds all the cards, and a long war of attrition is in their favor. The longer the war goes on, the more desperate Trump becomes.

🇮🇷 Images from the site of the HC-130J and MH-6 “Little Bird” helicopters south of Isfahan suggest possible shrapnel damage to the aircraft. This could indicate that the U.S. claim that the aircraft “got stuck” may mean they were too damaged to take off or may have crash-landed, as bent rotor blades visible in one image point toward a hard landing. However, this remains speculative. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

🇮🇷 Felt hat on the head. Bren gun on the shoulder. Love of the homeland in the heart. The tribes of Khuzestan, Kohgiluyeh and Boyer-Ahmad, and Chaharmahal and Bakhtiari have mobilized across the slopes of Mangasht Mountain searching for the downed American pilot. "They call the homeland 'mother.' A homeland that in times of war with the foreigner rekindles the fire of love across the Dena and Zagros mountains." IRIB reporter: the disruption to the US search and rescue operation is making things very difficult for the child-killing devil's army on the other side of the world. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
